ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Account ID associated with the media asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the media asset */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, article) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the media asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media asset was uploaded */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media asset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media asset (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag (for hierarchical tags) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_tags" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was added to the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_categories" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date and time the category was added to the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the media asset */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media asset was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_views_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the media asset */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media asset was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_downloads_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., upload, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
